title: Arlo Certified Accessories | Arlo Chime 2, Audible Alerts, Built-in Siren, Customisable Melody, Connection Direct to Wi-Fi, Designed for Arlo Video Doorbells and Pro Cameras, AC2001-100UKS
features: INSTANT AUDIBLE NOTIFICATIONS: Receive notifications from the Chime when someone is at the door

COMPATIBLE WITH ARLO CAMERAS: Instantly receive chime alerts when the button is pressed or when the motion sensor is triggered; Compatible with Arlo Doorbells, Arlo Pro 4,/4xl, Pro 5, Floodlight (except GO)
CUSTOMISE RING ALERTS: Select from a wide range of different melodies and customised alert options
ARLO DOORBELL COMPATABILITY: AVD1001, AVD2001, AVD1001B, AVD2001B & AAD1001 Doorbells from Arlo; It is also compatible with bullet cameras Pro 4, Pro 5 & Floodlight
Easy Installation Simple to install plugging into a power socket and connecting directly to Wi-fi
Troubleshooting - Please have the router closer to the product
description: From the manufacturer Previous page Next page 1 Early Warning System 2 AI Fire Detection 3 AI Facial Recognition 4 AI Package Detection 5 AI Secure Plans Arlo Smart Video Doorbell with Full HD Video Video Call Alerts Receive a video call to your mobile the moment the doorbell is pressed, so you can see, hear and speak to whoever is there - without having to wait for the app to open! Head to Toe Viewing Angle A unique square field-of-view captures visitors from head to toe and even parcels on the floor so you can see exactly who and what is at your door. Loud Alarm Siren Scare off intruders with the built-in 80 db smart siren that can be heard up to 30 metres away. Have it automatically go-off if motion is detected or trigger from the app to quickly raise the alarm. Real-time Talk Built in speaker & microphone lets you speak to visitors or warn off intruders even if you aren’t home.
